predictions.text: AI agents will fundamentally change how programmers work within 2-3 years
Full software engineering automation will trigger AGI through self-improving loop in 10-15 years
2 billion people will become software creators as barriers drop vs current 30M developers
Most valuable software creator advantage is audience not technical skill
